docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-01-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST RAYMOND A. PATENAUDE, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-01-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-16-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: YVONNE LEE, CSR# 5616. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
